projects.summary_zh: 极致轻量边缘AI助手 | ESP32-S3专用固件
projects.summary_en: Ultra-lightweight edge AI assistant firmware | ESP32-S3 exclusive
projects.recommendation_zh: 适合硬件极客与边缘AI开发者，资源受限场景首选
projects.recommendation_en: Best for hardware enthusiasts and edge-AI devs in resource-constrained scenarios
highlights_zh: 纯C实现，$5芯片上运行完整AI助手，无OS依赖
双层配置系统 + 串口CLI，生产环境灵活调试
多语言文档（EN/CN/JA）+ 专业CI/CD发布流程
highlights_en: Pure C implementation — full AI assistant on $5 chip, no OS dependency
Dual-layer config with runtime CLI — production-friendly debugging
Multi-language docs (EN/CN/JA) + professional CI/CD release pipeline
concerns_zh: 仅6位贡献者，发布仅2次，长期维护风险较高
严重依赖ESP32-S3硬件平台，代码无可移植性
文档中未见测试框架，无法评估运行时稳定性
concerns_en: Only 6 contributors and 2 releases — high long-term maintenance risk
Heavily ESP32-S3-specific — no code portability to other platforms
No test framework visible in docs — runtime stability unverifiable

projects.name: angel-claw
projects.description: Lean. Compatible. Based OpenClaw. Python ❤️
projects.summary_zh: 功能完备的安全多租户AI代理OS | 单维护者可持续性风险较高
projects.summary_en: Feature-rich secure multi-tenant AI agent OS | High sustainability risk due to single maintainer
projects.recommendation_zh: 技术架构优秀，适合有DevOps能力的团队 POC；生产环境需评估单点维护风险
projects.recommendation_en: Excellent architecture for POC; evaluate single-maintainer risk for production use
highlights_zh: 完整的运行时沙箱隔离（30s超时+线程池）
AES-128加密用户密钥库+多模型支持
highlights_en: Complete runtime sandboxing with 30s timeout and thread pools
AES-128 encrypted user vaults with multi-model LLM support
concerns_zh: 单贡献者+无CI/CD+仅5 Stars，社区可持续性极低
Redis外部依赖增加运维复杂度
concerns_en: Single contributor + no CI/CD + only 5 Stars = extremely low community sustainability
External Redis dependency increases operational complexity

projects.name: Awesome-OpenClaw
projects.description: A carefully curated list of awesome OpenClaw resources — not everything, just the best.  Skills · Plugins · MCP · Tools · Deployments · Security · Research · Alternatives。精心策划的 OpenClaw 优质资源大合集 —— 不求大而全，只求真有用。
projects.summary_zh: 单维护者精选资源列表 | 文档质量优秀但社区可持续性存疑
projects.summary_en: Single-maintainer curated resource list | Excellent documentation but questionable community sustainability
projects.recommendation_zh: 适合快速了解 OpenClaw 生态，选型决策参考
projects.recommendation_en: Good for quickly understanding OpenClaw ecosystem and informed decision-making
highlights_zh: 文档结构规范：CONTRIBUTING.md、PR模板、安全报告流程完备
视觉资产精良：ecosystem-map.svg 采用专业渐变和过滤效果
highlights_en: Well-structured documentation: CONTRIBUTING.md, PR templates, security reporting flow complete
Professional visual assets: ecosystem-map.svg with gradient fills and filter effects
concerns_zh: 单一贡献者维护，148 stars 社区关注度较低，无 CI/CD 自动验证链接有效性
concerns_en: Single contributor maintaining, low community attention at 148 stars, no CI/CD to verify link validity

projects.name: GoGogot
projects.description: Lightweight self-hosted AI agent. Open-source OpenClaw alternative in Go.
projects.summary_zh: 轻量级自托管AI助手 | 接口设计优秀但单点维护风险
projects.summary_en: Lightweight self-hosted AI agent | Strong interfaces but single-maintainer risk
projects.recommendation_zh: 个人/小团队自用优先，不建议作为生产关键基础设施

highlights_zh: Clean Go interfaces (Backend/Transport/Tool) 实现高度解耦
多平台Docker镜像支持 (amd64/arm64)，环境变量配置灵活
highlights_en: Clean Go interfaces (Backend/Transport/Tool) for high decoupling
Multi-platform Docker images (amd64/arm64) with flexible env config
concerns_zh: 单人维护，无CI/CD，版本115但无测试可见性
无issue模板/贡献指南，单点故障风险显著
concerns_en: Single maintainer, no CI/CD, 115 stars but no visible tests
No issue templates/CONTRIBUTING, single point of failure risk

projects.name: mini-claw
projects.description: 🦞 Minimalist alternative to OpenClaw — lightweight personal AI assistant with multi-platform messaging support

文档完善：README + CLAUDE.md + Makefile 清晰易用
功能完整：会话管理、限流、权限控制、超时保护

Excellent documentation: README + CLAUDE.md + Makefile
Complete features: session management, rate limiting, access control

Depends on external Pi agent, Node.js 22+ requirement

projects.name: troublemaker
projects.description: Mom, liberated. Multi-platform AI agent runtime.

projects.summary_en: Early-stage multi-platform AI agent runtime | Docker-ready deployment | Single-maintainer risk

Docker化完整：系统依赖、Chromium、GitHub CLI等预装
支持host和docker sandbox双模式运行

Full Docker setup: system deps, Chromium, GitHub CLI pre-installed
Dual sandbox modes: host or Docker container execution

大量依赖外部包（mariozechner/*），上游变更风险
concerns_en: Single contributor, no CI/CD — no automated quality gates
Version 0.1.0 — production stability unproven

projects.name: openclawWeComzh
projects.description: Open-source implementation of the AEON Protocol for advanced AI cognitive observability, featuring real-time dialectic flow tracking, automated memory distillation (Auto-Seal), and knowledge aging visualization.
projects.summary_zh: 功能完善的本地化AI网关 | 项目已停止维护存在长期风险
projects.summary_en: Feature-rich localized AI gateway | Project EOL with long-term viability concerns

多架构Dockerfile支持，跨平台安装脚本完善（macOS/Linux/Windows）

Multi-architecture Dockerfile support with cross-platform install scripts

仅有2次发布、1个maintainer，长期维护风险高
concerns_en: Project explicitly declared EOL; all updates migrating to OpenAEON repository
Only 2 releases and 1 maintainer indicate high long-term maintenance risk

projects.name: nanoclaw-py
projects.description: Yet another nano alternative to OpenClaw. It can read/write files, execute commands, search the web, and schedule tasks — all in ~500 lines of Python.
projects.summary_zh: 轻量级 Claude AI 助手项目 | MCP 工具架构优秀但可持续性存疑
projects.summary_en: Lightweight Claude AI assistant | Excellent MCP tool architecture but sustainability concerns
projects.recommendation_zh: 适合个人实验和原型开发，生产环境需谨慎
projects.recommendation_en: Suitable for personal experiments and prototyping; caution advised for production use

代码组织良好，模块职责分明，约 500 行简洁实现
highlights_en: Clean MCP tool architecture with 6 tools for task scheduling and messaging
Well-organized code with clear module responsibilities in ~500 lines
concerns_zh: 单一贡献者可持续性风险，无测试覆盖，无 CI/CD
生产部署需额外考虑安全性和错误处理

projects.name: trinity-claw
projects.description: A self-hosted AI agent that thinks, acts, and improves itself – all running privately on your own machine. Browses the web, writes and executes code, manages files, sends emails, monitors URLs, builds websites, and learns from every interaction.
projects.summary_zh: 自托管多技能AI代理MVP | 架构合理但成熟度极低
projects.summary_en: Self-hosted multi-skill AI agent MVP | Solid architecture but extremely low maturity
projects.recommendation_zh: 观望期，慎用生产环境
projects.recommendation_en: Watch phase - cautious for production use
highlights_zh: Docker容器化部署完善，支持HF Spaces/Mac/Linux多平台
动态技能架构（dynamic skills）设计合理
基础设施完整：PostgreSQL、ChromaDB、LiteLLM、Nginx
.gitattributes处理跨平台换行符，跨平台兼容性好
highlights_en: Docker containerized with HF Spaces/Mac/Linux multi-platform support
Dynamic skill architecture design is well-structured
Complete infrastructure: PostgreSQL, ChromaDB, LiteLLM, Nginx
Cross-platform line ending handling via .gitattributes
concerns_zh: 单贡献者，5 stars，零release，成熟度极低
docker-compose.yml中硬编码凭证（sk-1234567890）
提供的源码样本不足（仅6个文件），无Python代码可审计
无测试代码可见，健壮性无法评估
concerns_en: Single contributor, 5 stars, zero releases - extremely low maturity
Hardcoded credentials (sk-1234567890) in docker-compose.yml
Insufficient code sample (only 6 files), no Python code to audit
No visible tests - robustness cannot be assessed

projects.name: supaclaw
projects.description: A basic version of OpenClaw but built entirely on Supabase built-in features.
projects.summary_zh: Supabase原生AI代理框架 | 最小化基础设施但可持续性存疑
projects.summary_en: Supabase-native AI agent framework | Minimal infra but uncertain sustainability
projects.recommendation_zh: 适合Supabase深度用户快速原型，谨慎用于生产
projects.recommendation_en: Ideal for Supabase power users prototyping; use cautiously in production
highlights_zh: 充分利用Supabase内置能力(Edge Functions/pg_cron/pgvector)减少外部依赖
良好的安全设计(无凭证暴露/模拟Bash环境/审计回滚机制)
highlights_en: Leverages Supabase built-ins (Edge Functions/pg_cron/pgvector) minimizing external deps
Strong security design with credential isolation and simulated bash environment
concerns_zh: 无CI/CD和测试覆盖，质量保障缺失
贡献者极少(2人)且无正式发布版本，长期维护风险高
concerns_en: No CI/CD pipeline or test coverage, lacking quality assurance
Very few contributors (2) with zero releases, high long-term maintenance risk

projects.name: shrew
projects.summary_zh: 超轻量级单二进制AI终端助手 | 安全性与可持续性待提升
projects.summary_en: Ultra-lightweight single-binary AI CLI agent | Security and sustainability need improvement
projects.recommendation_zh: 适合本地快速实验，生产环境需补充安全加固与测试覆盖
projects.recommendation_en: Suitable for local experiments; production use requires security hardening and test coverage
highlights_zh: 单一静态二进制，零外部依赖，跨平台构建完善（Makefile支持Linux/macOS amd64/arm64）
Vault系统设计精巧，敏感信息仅在执行时注入，本地存储隔离
highlights_en: Single static binary with zero external dependencies, excellent cross-platform build support
Vault system design is elegant, secrets injected at execution time only and stored locally
concerns_zh: api.go中多处忽略错误（json.Marshal、io.ReadAll），http.Client无超时配置
runShellCommand无命令参数清理，存在命令注入风险
writeFile使用0644权限过于宽松
单贡献者维护，无CI/CD，缺少单元测试
daemon.go中resp.Body被io.ReadAll消耗后可能无法json解码
concerns_en: Multiple ignored errors in api.go (json.Marshal, io.ReadAll), http.Client has no timeout
runShellCommand lacks command argument sanitization, command injection risk
writeFile uses overly permissive 0644 file permissions
Single contributor, no CI/CD, lack of unit tests
resp.Body consumed by io.ReadAll may prevent subsequent json decoding in daemon.go
